patterns.name: WEAK_BUY + Earnings Catalyst
patterns.description: WEAK_BUY technical signal combined with upcoming earnings catalyst within 30 days
entry_criteria: WEAK_BUY or BUY signal from enhanced research
Earnings or major catalyst within 30 days
REQUIRED: Price confirmation (close > prior day high OR pullback to 20 SMA)
REQUIRED: Broader market not in distribution phase
exit_rules: Catalyst exit: Full exit after earnings if thesis plays out

risk_management.max_correlation: Avoid if >0.7 correlation to existing positions

occurrences.lessons: Entry lacked price confirmation. Early stop hit same day. Consider waiting for pullback to 20 SMA or momentum confirmation.

patterns.notes: Based on backtest: WEAK_BUY alone has 73-79% win rate. Adding earnings catalyst should improve odds. Need 5+ occurrences to calculate reliable stats.

patterns.name: Deep Value AI Infrastructure
patterns.description: AI beneficiary trading at significant discount to peers with clear growth runway
entry_criteria: P/E or EV/Sales < 60% of peer median
exit_rules: Full exit: Valuation reaches peer average
patterns.notes: SMCI at 14.5x P/E vs 25-30x peers. Deep value AI play. Requires monitoring of capex cycle and competition.

patterns.name: Crypto Oversold Bounce
patterns.description: RSI < 40 on crypto with positive sentiment shift
exit_rules: Stop: Below recent low or RSI > 70

patterns.name: Semiconductor AI Play
patterns.description: AI infrastructure beneficiary with accelerating demand
patterns.notes: SMCI candidate. Need to run checklist before entry.
